__comment__: Frozen baseline n_reliable per problem. Lowest observed n_reliable across the 7-model AmnesiaBench Scott-25 cohort (Claude Haiku/Opus/Sonnet 4.5/4.6, DeepSeek 3.2, GLM-5, GPT-5.4, Qwen3-Coder-480B). Problems unsolved by all 7 models use 40000 as a high-but-finite placeholder.
__reference_models__: claude-haiku, claude-opus, claude-sonnet, deepseek-3.2, glm-5, gpt-5.4, qwen-480b
